resources.string: DataGuard needs Usage Access to read mobile data statistics. Tap the button below, find DataGuard in the list, and turn the permission on.
Heaviest users at the top. Use the dropdown on the right to give any app its own speed limit.

Cap this device\'s speed so data drains slower and lasts longer. Uses a local VPN — no traffic leaves the device, and your internet keeps working. Throttles browsers and apps that use the system proxy; video may buffer at low caps (that is expected). Tap a speed to apply it instantly — no Save needed.

Throttle devices on your hotspot. Pick a speed and turn this on, then on each connected device set a manual Wi-Fi proxy (instructions appear below). Works for browsers and most apps; a guest can leave the proxy unset to stay un-throttled.
